Appearances:
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Jane Kao.
Ted Janowsky, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant: Joaquin Guzman.
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem Koorosh Afshari, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions in Dept. 304-B.
The parties enter into a signed agreement "Stipulation for settlement and entry of future Judgment", which was filed.
Case settled, matter is taken off calendar.
